author: doll-agent
content: Implemented record_batch_from_columns(columns: &[(name, &DynArray)]) -> RecordBatch and record_batch_to_columns(batch) -> Vec<(name, DynArray)> in extras.rs. Each column maps to an Arrow Array via dtype_to_arrow + dynarray_to_arrow; the schema is built from per-column DType. Validates equal column lengths (Arrow's RecordBatch contract). Round-trip test verifies a 2-column (i32, f64) batch survives full conversion. Wider dtype coverage follows #644. Tracks #559.
